funcbody:
func formatTimeHeader(when time.Time) ([]byte, int, int) {
	y, mo, d := when.Date()
	h, mi, s := when.Clock()
	ns := when.Nanosecond() / 1000000
	// len("2006/01/02 15:04:05.123 ")==24
	var buf [24]byte

	buf[0] = y1[y/1000%10]
	buf[1] = y2[y/100]
	buf[2] = y3[y-y/100*100]
	buf[3] = y4[y-y/100*100]
	buf[4] = '/'
	buf[5] = mo1[mo-1]
	buf[6] = mo2[mo-1]
	buf[7] = '/'
	buf[8] = d1[d-1]
	buf[9] = d2[d-1]
	buf[10] = ' '
	buf[11] = h1[h]
	buf[12] = h2[h]
	buf[13] = ':'
	buf[14] = mi1[mi]
	buf[15] = mi2[mi]
	buf[16] = ':'
	buf[17] = s1[s]
	buf[18] = s2[s]
	buf[19] = '.'
	buf[20] = ns1[ns/100]
	buf[21] = ns1[ns%100/10]
	buf[22] = ns1[ns%10]

	buf[23] = ' '

	return buf[0:], d, h
}
